expected_pressure: fixed body and clear route where disability machinery should not matter
limping changes feasible routes, making capability state, pacing, route changes, and support tools useful
vision and hearing loss make sensor compensation, tools, and safer routes necessary
wound infection risk makes hidden damage state, treatment timing, repair access, and pacing useful
combined damage makes help-seeking, compensation tools, and route adaptation preserve future action
after restore, known damage, repair history, tools, help, and route adaptations must survive
